title: Better Vanila Cake
description: Eat cake from your hand! Break a cake and get it with the remaining slices with a durability bar.
body:
![Image of eating a cake](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/173394ca76548bdbcc177d7e697587d164aa4f99.jpeg)!

Lets you eat cake directly from your hand.
Hold a cake and press Shift + Right Click to eat slices with the normal eating animation.
The item shows a durability bar to represent remaining slices.
If you place it, it places a cake with the same bites already taken.
Breaking a cake drops a Handheld Cake that keeps the bite state.

##Communication
If you have any issues or ideas to improve this project feel free to join discord channel where you can ask or tell me anything.

[Donate](https://ko-fi.com/drixzy)
